Actions.Text: COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES
ORDERED TO THIRD READING RULES CAL.1430

Title: Authorizes the town attorney of the town of Islip to be a nonresident of such town
Summary: Authorizes the town attorney of the town of Islip, in the county of Suffolk, to be a nonresident of such town.
LawCode: Amd §23, Town L; amd §3, Pub Off L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the town law and the public officers law, in relation to authorizing the town attorney of the town of Islip, county of Suffolk, to be a nonresident of such town
